name: A4 Realty Blog Automation - Ollama Draft Creator

parameters.content:
## Before running

1. Start this Next.js app on port 3000.
2. Start Ollama and pull/sign in for `gemma4:31b-cloud`.
3. Edit topics in the `Topic Queue` node.
4. Run `Manual Test Trigger` first.
5. Blogs are created as DRAFTS - review in /admin/blogs before publishing.

Inside Docker, n8n must call host services with `host.docker.internal`, not `localhost`.
Admin credentials are pre-configured in the Login node.
